subject: feat(pwa): track previous install to suppress false warnings and banner
body:
We were already writing 'installed' events to analytics via trackPWAEvent
but never reading them back. Now getWasPreviouslyInstalled() checks for a
prior install so:
- The diagnostic warning is suppressed when browsing in-tab after install
- The install banner is hidden (canInstall=false) for returning users
- The appinstalled event listener catches installs via browser UI

This fixes the case where isStandalone=false (browser tab) but the app IS
installed — Chrome won't fire beforeinstallprompt, which caused a false
warning and showed the install prompt to someone who already installed.

Tags: pwa, debug, mobile, ux
